channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Gorillaz Go All-In With Sparks For ‘Happy Dictator’ Performance on ‘Kimmel’: Watch
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest music trends. Tonight, we're talking about a unique collaboration that's got edgier music fans buzzing. The British 'cartoon band' Gorillaz has teamed up with American alternative pop duo Sparks, and the result is pure magic."
[Short music clip plays]
Host: "The two bands recently performed their lead single 'The Happy Dictator' on Jimmy Kimmel Live. For this performance, Gorillaz' iconic animations took a back seat, and the band members, including Damon Albarn, took center stage. The song is part of Gorillaz' ninth studio album, The Mountain, which has already climbed to the top of the U.K. charts and reached number one on Billboard's Top Rock & Alternative Albums chart."
[Short music clip plays]
Host: "The Mountain is a globally-inspired album, recorded in various locations around the world, including London, India, and the United States. It features an impressive lineup of collaborators and songs performed in five languages. Gorillaz is now taking the album on tour, with dates scheduled throughout the U.K. and Europe, including a massive headline show at London's Tottenham Hotspur Stadium."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for tonight. If you want to catch Gorillaz live, check out their tour dates and get ready for an unforgettable show. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you next time."
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
